历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 2375; in 2023, due to a gap, it dropped to about 11862; in 2024, it rebounded to around 5993; in 2025, the Physics Category further recovered to about 3701, showing a clear upward trend in the past two years, with a baseline of about 3701 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the Physics Category was 47 from 2022 to 2024, increased to 49 in 2025, and is planned to be 51 in 2026, an increase of 2 students (about 4.1%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks about 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 60-65 range in recent years, indicating a mid-to-upper comprehensive strength. No significant negative public opinion incidents have been observed in recent reputation monitoring. Its Douyin popularity ranks 52nd overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms, and normal application attention. No gaps or abnormal records in admissions have been seen. Water Resources Engineering is rated A+ (top in the country), Civil Engineering A, and Environmental Science and Engineering A, with these three flagship disciplines highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Water Resources, Civil Engineering, and Environmental Engineering, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, and Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity. Hohai University offers popular majors like Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Communication Engineering in its Ningxia Physics Category enrollment, helping maintain application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Ningxia is about 66,000, a slight increase from the combined total of about 65,897 in 2025 for History and Physics categories, intensifying competition slightly. Provincial control line data has been incorporated for reference. 7. [Geographical Factors] Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has some geographical appeal to candidates from the northwest region. However, its enrollment scale in Ningxia is small (about 49-51 for Physics Category), with a very low enrollment proportion, limiting the impact of geographical preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 3701, the 2026 Physics Category expansion of 2 students (planned 51), a slight increase in Ningxia candidate numbers, stable university reputation, and prominent advantageous disciplines, the minimum admission rank for the 2026 Physics Category is expected to slightly decline from the 2025 level. The predicted minimum rank is about 3812, with a range of 3312-4312.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted rank is about 3812. Candidates with ranks between 3300 and 4300 are recommended to consider this university. Those with ranks within 3300 can aim for Tier 1 popular majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Dayu Strengthened Class); those with ranks between 3500 and 4000 should focus on Tier 2 majors (Water Resources and Hydropower, Communication, Automation, etc.), while also considering Hohai's flagship Water Resources direction; those with ranks above 4000 should use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Although the Civil Engineering industry is cooling, the discipline is rated A-level, and Environmental Engineering also has A-level discipline support.
